User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account containing authentication links, basic metadata, and KYC level statuses.

referredBy.description: Referral code of User who invited this user

deviceBound.description: Locks session to original mobile device identifier

Wallet.title: User Wallet
Wallet.description: Financial records ledger containing funds, virtual deposit account mappings and balance restrictions.

ownerId.description: User ID of the wallet owner

balance.description: Current active spending balance in NGN

lockedBalance.description: Locked or reserved balance under escrow/fraud review

virtualBankName.description: Monnify or Wema designated deposit account bank Name

Transaction.title: Financial Transaction
Transaction.description: Auditable log of purchases, transfers, allocations and fundings inside the VTU core ledger.

ownerId.description: UID of user who performed transaction

amount.description: Total gross amount debited or credited

network.description: MTN, Glo, Airtel, 9Mobile, DSTV, Eko Electric, etc.

recipient.description: Target phone number, smartcard, account, or token holder meter number

vtuProvider.description: Underlying API used - VTU_NG, VTUGATE, SME_API

AgentProfile.title: Agent Multi-Level Records
AgentProfile.description: Commissions tracking and rank calculations for business network representatives.

monthlyVolume.description: Aggregated transactional value this calendar month

VtuConfig.title: VTU Provider Route Configurations
VtuConfig.description: Configurations managing VTU client APIs, endpoints, margins, and active routing keys.

autoFailoverEnabled.description: Triggers automatic failover to backup if primary responds cold

airtimeDiscountPercent.description: General discount margin kept by Super Admin

dataProfitMarginPercent.description: Profit margin on utility data packs

AuditLog.title: Security Intrusion & Session Log
AuditLog.description: Trace logging protecting wallets against unauthorized device bindings and failed authentication.

deviceFingerprint.description: Browser user-agent hash or hardware secure-enclave GUID

/users/{userId}.description: Stores core authentication profile information and verified BVN/NIN indicators.

/wallets/{walletId}.description: Financial records storing standard NGN card-funding points, locked reviews or deposit account listings.

/transactions/{transactionId}.description: The atomic ledger containing VTU orders, cables, electricity utilities, airtime topups and bank statements.

/agents/{agentId}.description: Stores sales commission statistics, tier ranks, volume sizes and multi-level referral networks.

/system/vtu_routes.description: Global failover options between VTU.ng and top alternatives, and configurable commission rules.

/audit_logs/{logId}.description: Maintains persistent session state maps, failed PIN inputs, security locks, and intrusion patterns.
